Hypothesis: Customers with lower purchase frequency are more likely to churn.
Supporting_Evidence: Order frequency comparison and spending distribution charts.
Business_Action: Create reactivation journeys for declining buyers.

Hypothesis: Customers showing reduced web engagement have higher churn risk.
Supporting_Evidence: Sessions, product views, and campaign click analysis.
Business_Action: Launch personalized recommendations for inactive visitors.

Hypothesis: Customers experiencing multiple support issues show elevated churn.
Supporting_Evidence: Support ticket volume, resolution time, and reopen analysis.
Business_Action: Improve support quality and reduce complaint resolution delays.

Hypothesis: Customers with higher returns and poor ratings churn more often.
Supporting_Evidence: Return counts, ratings, and delivery experience comparison.
Business_Action: Investigate product quality and fulfillment experience.

Hypothesis: Certain acquisition channels generate lower customer loyalty.
Business_Action: Optimize marketing spend toward higher-retention channels.
